commit_message:
Enhance interface verifier with derived cache and flit stats (Fixes #… Enhance interface verifier with derived cache and flit stats (Fixes #… Summary
Added a "Derived Statistics" section to the bp_nonsynth_if_verif module. This section calculates and prints L1 I/D-cache sizes in KB and the flit-per-message-header counts for LCE and MEM interfaces during simulation initialization.

Issue Fixed
Fixes #343

Area
bp_top/test/common/bp_nonsynth_if_verif.sv

Reasoning (new feature, inefficien
